mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gym_reviews (gym_id, user_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{gymId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.gym_id, r.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM gym_reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.gym_id, r.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM gym_reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gym_reviews WHERE gym_id = #{gymId}
mapper.update: UPDATE gyms SET rating_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gym_reviews WHERE gym_id = #{gymId}), rating_avg = COALESCE((SELECT AVG(rating) FROM gym_reviews WHERE gym_id = #{gymId}), 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{gymId}
